question: Based on the chart, how does Brand C’s market share change from 2016 to 2021?

options.C: It fluctuates but ends up around the same level as it started
options.D: It remains exactly the same in all years

explanation: The years along the x‑axis are presented in a scrambled order rather than true chronological order. If you reorder the columns by year and inspect only the segments for brand C, you will see that 2021 has the largest share. Simply picking the tallest segment based on the current left‑to‑right sequence can lead to choosing the wrong year.
